        2.  Another base is at an airport that ceased operations in 2015 (which, in the context of Lithuanian aviation, refers to the former Air Lituanica hub or a similar defunct entity).

While `AirBaltic` has a value of `1`, the evidence does not explicitly state that AirBaltic has a base at the specific airport that ceased operations in 2015.
